title: New robot waifus, GLM 5.2 craze, AI spas, new world models, new science agents: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers emerging developments across vision, video, robotics, and language models. The episode highlights new world models, video generation tools, autonomous agents, and specialized LLM releases including GLM 5.2 and Midjourney Medical.
writeup: This AI Search roundup surveys recent releases across world models, video and image generation, and robotics. Named items include GLM 5.2, the LTX Trainer, Boogu Image, and Midjourney Medical, alongside research on video permanence and multimodal direction. The segment also touches on robotics hardware and research touching on test-time compute, video inpainting, and multimodal learning. It serves as a snapshot of current tooling and model launches rather than a deep dive into any single system.
